name: kadlekai-mcp
description: Kadlekai time tracking MCP server integration for Claude Code

postInstall.message:
✅ Kadlekai MCP plugin installed!

📋 Next steps:
1. Set your API token: export KADLEKAI_API_TOKEN=your_token
2. Set API URL (optional): export KADLEKAI_API_URL=https://kadle.ai
3. Start tracking: /time:start working on my project

Available commands:
• /time:start - Start a timer
• /time:stop - Stop timer
• /time:status - Check status
• /time:report - Generate reports

Need a token? Generate one from Kadlekai settings or use:
bin/rails runner "puts AuthenticationService.new(current_user: User.first, request: nil).create_api_key_for_user(User.first, client_name: 'Claude Code')[:auth_token]"
